register.note: Forced 0: hero.png opens document-first (title, prose, a metadata card, four-pass nav) with no composed full-width visual, where ciechanowski-watch/00-viewport.png leads with a rendered watch as the page's face.
Forced 0 (no hero): nothing at the top depicts residuals/leverage the way seeing-theory-regression/01 draws the squared-error boxes around each point on the OLS line.

The See scatter self-labels (title chip, axis units, table headers, a linked highlighted row->point) but never names the residual/leverage mechanism in-canvas, so unlike distill-momentum/02 which captions each small-multiple with its governing math inline, the 'why a point matters' meaning still lives in the left prose — competent, not exemplar.

Cream ground, soft borders and AA type are calm, but the See viewport floats the canvas with a large empty gap below the title chip and a tall void under the short left column, where ciechanowski-watch/02 keeps figure, sliders and prose in tight deliberate vertical rhythm.

Interaction-driven changes (row<->point hover link, the mistyped-row toggle recomputing slope/estimate, the trend tipping) read purposeful, but no stepped/cinematic explanatory transition on the order of 3b1b-gradient-descent/02's ball descending the cost surface is evidenced in the static frames.

The semantic grammar holds without dilution across canvas, prose Term links and the experiment panel (blue=prediction line, amber=target points, crimson reserved for the single error: 'flattens the whole trend' and the wrecked £230k estimate), matching r2d3-trees/00's disciplined two-hue semantic split and extending it into prose.

hero.note: A hero would need a full-width scatter with the fitted line and one labeled high-leverage outlier visibly tilting it, composed and legible as a thumbnail, replacing the current title-plus-nav header.

assessment.note: The closing '05 TRANSFER' (sensor -9999 scenario) is a three-option multiple-choice card stack, not an interactive or open prompt, though the per-option feedback and the upstream experiment-task keep the Check from being a pure MCQ stack.

blocking: No hero: promote the See scatter into a full-width opening specimen that depicts the mechanism (the fitted line through the scatter with one labeled high-leverage outlier tilting it), replacing the document-first title-plus-nav header.
Add at least one in-canvas annotation naming the residual/leverage mechanism so the graphic carries its own 'why', lifting annotation-integration off 2.
Tighten the See viewport's vertical composition — close the empty gap below the canvas title chip and the void under the short left column — to reach atmosphere parity with the exemplars.
verdict.summary: Strong colour discipline (3) and honest interactivity, but document-first with no hero forces two 0s and caps the rest at 2 — holds below register 3.
